stemHtml: Under Part-FCL, which documents must a pilot always carry when exercising flight crew licence privileges?

options.a: A valid flight crew licence, a valid medical certificate, and a photo identification document.
options.b: A valid medical certificate, a recent passport photo, and current flight time records.
options.c: A valid flight crew licence, current flight time records, and a photo identification document.
options.d: A valid flight crew licence, a valid medical certificate, a recent passport photo, and current flight time records.
